confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.description: Provide a prompt that the user will see to confirm the dialog being executed.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Provide slot filling metadata for the dialog inputs.

propertyName.title: PropertyName
propertyName.description: Name of the input property to bind to.

channelData.title: Channel data
channelData.description: Contains parameters specific to the channel to be handled by the client.

value.title: Value
value.description: Contains parameters specific to the activity to be handled by the client.

title.title: Title
title.description: The text to display on the button. If not specified, a default value will be shown depending on the type of quick reply.

image.title: Image
image.description: An image URL or base64-encoded image string to display next to the button text.

imageAltText.title: Image alternative text
imageAltText.description: The alternative text to display on the image.

interdigitTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Interdigit timeout
interdigitTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit applies when your user hasn't met the minimum input length. It applies only to multi-digit DTMF input. The interdigit timeout must be a positive whole number and no special characters or letters can be used. The minimum recommended limit length is 500 ms.

terminationTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Termination timeout
terminationTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit applies when the user has met the maximum input length. It applies only to multi-digit DTMF input. After the limit times out, the bot will accept the input as complete and won't wait for more input. If the termination timeout is turned off, input will immediately be considered complete after it matches the maximum length specification. The termination timeout must be a positive whole number and no special characters or letters can be used.

usageDescription.title: Usage Description
usageDescription.description: Describes the purpose of the connector action

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: The list of actions that should be executed when triggered.

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique identifier for the trigger within the scope of this topic.

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: An optional condition that decides whether the topic should be triggered. Ignored when the topic is redirected to explicitly.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Set priority for this trigger against other qualifying triggers with lower numbers indicating higher priority.

runOnce.title: Run once
runOnce.description: Run this trigger only once per turn.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique ID for the action. Must be unique within the trigger.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: When disabled, an action does not execute.

conversationOutcome.title: Conversation outcome for analytics
conversationOutcome.description: Sets the outcome of the current session for the purpose of analytics. The outcome is set before the action's execution.

note.title: Notes
note.description: Sticky notes associated with the action.

displayName.title: Display name
displayName.description: The optional display name of the intent to display to the user during intent disambiguation.

availableInChannels.title: Available in channels
availableInChannels.description: List of channel IDs that the intent is available in.

includeInOnSelectIntent.title: Include in multiple topic matches
includeInOnSelectIntent.description: When more than one topic matches what the user says, this topic will be included in the options presented to the user.

triggerCondition.title: Condition
triggerCondition.description: Decides whether the knowledge source should be used by the AI planner. Ignored when used explicitly from a topic.

latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.title: Delay
latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.description: This setting determines how long the bot will wait before delivering the latency message after a background operation request has started. Timing is set in milliseconds.

minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.title: Minimum playback time
minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.description: The latency message will play for this amount of time, at least, even if the background operation completes while the message is playing. Timing is set in milliseconds.

schemaName.title: SchemaName
schemaName.description: The schema name of the expected component to be invoked.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of the agent's capabilities and purpose.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata including authors, tags, and other arbitrary properties

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique identifier of the resource.

includeMetadata.title: Include Metadata
includeMetadata.description: Determines whether additional metadata should be returned with the entity recognition results.

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness. Lowering the temperature means that the model will produce more repetitive and deterministic responses. Increasing the temperature will result in more unexpected or creative responses. Try adjusting temperature or Top P but not both.

topP.title: Top P
topP.description: Similar to temperature, this controls randomness but uses a different method. Lowering Top P will narrow the model's token selection to likelier tokens. Increasing Top P will let the model choose from tokens with both high and low likelihood. Try adjusting temperature or Top P but not both.

stopSequence.title: Stop sequence
stopSequence.description: Make the model end its response at a desired point. The model response will end before the specified sequence, so it won't contain the stop sequence text. For ChatGPT, using |im_end| ensures that the model response doesn't generate a follow-up user query. You can include as many as four stop sequences.

maxTokens.title: Maximum tokens in response
maxTokens.description: Set a limit on the number of tokens per model response. The total length of input tokens and generated tokens is limited by the model's context length. One token is roughly 4 characters for typical English text. If left empty, the model will use its max context length.

additionalProperties.title: AdditionalProperties
additionalProperties.description: Additional model specific properties. Use this property when you want to pass additional parameters that you know the underlying model can support.

deployment.title: Deployment Name
deployment.description: The name of the model deployment

latencyMessageSettings.title: Latency Message
latencyMessageSettings.description: In text conversations this message will be sent once. In voice conversations, this message will loop until the operation is complete.

input.title: Input
input.description: Maps variables to the inputs of this action

output.title: Output
output.description: Maps outputs of this action to variables.

errorHandling.title: Error handling
errorHandling.description: Determine what happens when an error occurs.

autoSend.title: Send a message
autoSend.description: When set to true, the bot automatically sends GPT-powered responses; if not, responses will not automatically be sent.

variable.title: Save bot response as
variable.description: The summarized content will be stored in this variable.

moderationLevel.title: Content moderation level
moderationLevel.description: Lower levels mean that your agent will generate more answers, but they may not be as relevant. Higher levels favor relevancy over the number of answers.

historyType.title: History to include
historyType.description: Conversation history type to include when preprocessing the text.

isFileAnalysisEnabled.title: File Analysis Input
isFileAnalysisEnabled.description: Apply file analysis capability when files are uploaded to a chat

additionalInstructions.title: Custom instructions
additionalInstructions.description: Explain how you want the agent to respond or what you want it to do when responding. For example, you can say "talk in a professional manner."

unrecognizedPrompt.title: Retry prompt
unrecognizedPrompt.description: Send this message again when a valid response isn't identified.

repeatCount.title: How many reprompts
repeatCount.description: The maximum number of times this message will be repeated when a valid response isn't identified.

activityProcessed.title: Activity processed
activityProcessed.description: When set to false, reprocesses the message after redirecting to the target dialog.

activityProcessed.title: Activity processed
activityProcessed.description: When set to false, reprocesses the message after redirecting to the target dialog.

intent.title: Intent
intent.description: Definition of the intent to be recognized.

originType.title: OriginType
originType.description: Type of Origin of a Test Activity.

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this topic.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this topic.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: The activity to send. If Mode is Generated, the activity will be used as an example for the model response.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Determines how the model will respond. If Strict, the activity will be sent directly, if Generated, the model will generate a response.

name.title: Name
name.description: Indicates the purpose of the event to be handled by the client.

allowBargeIn.title: Allow barge-in
allowBargeIn.description: Users can interrupt bot during audio play back.

randomizeVariantSelection.title: Randomize Variant Selection
randomizeVariantSelection.description: When enabled, reprompts are played in random order. When disabled, they are played sequentially.

allowBargeIn.title: Allow barge-in
allowBargeIn.description: Users can interrupt bot during audio play back.

randomizeVariantSelection.title: Randomize Variant Selection
randomizeVariantSelection.description: When enabled, reprompts are played in random order. When disabled, they are played sequentially.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text to send to the bot when clicked.

displayText.title: Displayed text
displayText.description: The text to display as a sent message in the chat history after the user has clicked.

url.title: URL
url.description: The full URL to open when clicked.

MakeCall.title: Make a call
MakeCall.description: Sends a link that starts a call.

phoneNumber.title: Phone number
phoneNumber.description: The phone number to call when clicked.

SendHiddenMessageBack.title: Send a hidden message
SendHiddenMessageBack.description: Sends a plain text message not shown in chat history.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text to send to the bot when clicked. This will not be shown in the chat history after sending.

text.title: Text
text.description: Text content of the citation, this is typically the entire chunk obtained from search results.

url.title: URL
url.description: Full URL linking to the source page or file.

iconUrl.title: IconURL
iconUrl.description: Icon URL associated with file or page location.

AutomaticTaskInput.title: Automatically collect input
AutomaticTaskInput.description: Let AI determine how this input should be collected. Optionally provide additional display and description information to the guide the model.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the task input. By default will come from the task action input but may be overwritten.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of the task input. By default will come from the task action input but may be overwritten.

shouldPromptUser.title: Should prompt user
shouldPromptUser.description: When false, this input will not be prompted by LLM to the user, but LLM will still slot fill this input if it recognizes an answer from the user prompt.

defaultValue.title: Value
defaultValue.description: The default value to use instead of prompting the user

generateMapping.title: Enable assigning DTMF keys to options
generateMapping.description: Only supported for Boolean, List variables, Multiple choice options, and Custom close list entities.

readOutOptions.title: Read options aloud
readOutOptions.description: Only supported for Boolean, list variables, multiple choice options, and closed list entities.

samples.title: Sample phrases
samples.description: Advanced Natural Language Understanding training samples to enhance entity recognition

speechRecognitionFormat.title: Numbers in user's entire response
speechRecognitionFormat.description: Numbers up to nine are spelled out ("one"), while higher numbers are in numerals ("10").

ambiguousResolutionBehavior.title: Ambiguous date/time resolution
ambiguousResolutionBehavior.description: Controls how ambiguous date/time values are resolved

ambiguousResolutionBehavior.title: Ambiguous date/time resolution
ambiguousResolutionBehavior.description: Controls how ambiguous date/time values are resolved

ambiguousResolutionBehavior.title: Ambiguous date/time resolution
ambiguousResolutionBehavior.description: Controls how ambiguous date/time values are resolved

includeFileMetadata.title: Include file metadata
includeFileMetadata.description: Determine whether the file is represented as a record with Content, Name and ContentType, or just a File variable

optionSetName.title: Option set name
optionSetName.description: Name of the option set in Power FX used to reference items in the list.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The activity to send to the user. Can be either a custom message or AI-generated. If not provided, it will default to AI-generated.

repeatCount.title: How many reprompts
repeatCount.description: The maximum number of times this message will be repeated when a valid response isn't identified.

validation.title: Condition
validation.description: Additional criteria the entity must meet to be considered valid. Must be a formula that evaluates as true or false (e.g. 'Topic.Var1 < 10').

defaultValue.title: Action if no entity found
defaultValue.description: The value to assign the result variable when the maximum retry count has been reached and no entity has been identified.

invalidPrompt.title: Condition not met prompt
invalidPrompt.description: The prompt to send when the identified entity doesn't pass the validation rules.

defaultValueResponse.title: No entity found message
defaultValueResponse.description: The message to send when the maximum retry count has been reached and the default entity is used.

unrecognizedPrompt.title: Retry prompt
unrecognizedPrompt.description: Send this message again when a valid response isn't identified.

ManualTaskInput.title: Provide a specific value
ManualTaskInput.description: Provide an exact value for this input. This input will not be considered by AI.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value to bind to the input.

modelDisplayName.title: Model Display Name
modelDisplayName.description: Overrides the display name of this component when used by AI models.

modelDescription.title: Model Description
modelDescription.description: Overrides the description of this component when used by AI models.

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.description: Override descriptions for outputs of this task.

triggerCondition.title: When this tool may be used
triggerCondition.description: Indicates whether the tool may be used by the agent. When true, the tool may be called. When false, the tool may not be used unless called directly by a topic or agent.

propertyName.title: PropertyName
propertyName.description: Name of the output property to bind to.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the task output. By default will come from the task action output but may be overwritten.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of the task output. By default will come from the task action output but may be overwritten.

botSchemaName.title: BotSchemaName
botSchemaName.description: The schema name of the agent to invoke.

historyType.title: History to include
historyType.description: Conversation history type to include when invoking the agent.

shouldSendStartConversation.title: Should send start conversation event
shouldSendStartConversation.description: Decides whether the parent agent sends a startConversation activity to initialize the agent

ConversationHistory.title: Include conversation history.
ConversationHistory.description: Include past messages from the current conversation.

numberOfPastUserMessagesToInclude.title: Number of past user messages to include.
numberOfPastUserMessagesToInclude.description: The number of past messages from the current conversation's history to include.

allowInterruption.title: Allow switching to another topic
allowInterruption.description: If the user's response matches another topic with high confidence, that topic will be allowed to interrupt.

allowedInterruptTopics.title: Only selected topics
allowedInterruptTopics.description: Select topics that can interrupt this action.

mode.title: End user authentication
mode.description: Control which user authentication type will be used

supportsCalling.title: SupportsCalling
supportsCalling.description: This allows MSTeams voice call to MCS agent where MCS provisions ACS and event grid resources

isTeamsIvrEnabled.title: IsTeamsIvrEnabled
isTeamsIvrEnabled.description: This allows MSTeams Auto-Attendant to call MCS agent where MSTeams itself configures the ACS provisioning and connects to MCS via conversation conductor channel

isTelephonyEnabled.title: Enable Telephony
isTelephonyEnabled.description: Set up your bot for voice-first channels like telephony.

sensitiveDataMaskingSettings.title: Inbound transcript redaction
sensitiveDataMaskingSettings.description: Redact sensitive data, such as credit card or social security numbers, within logging transcripts.

isAgentConnectable.title: Let other agents connect to and use this one
isAgentConnectable.description: Let agents work together to complete workflows

voiceProcessingMode.title: VoiceProcessingMode
voiceProcessingMode.description: Represents the mode of voice used by the agent, classic or realtime.

isRedactCreditCardEnabled.title: Redact credit card numbers
isRedactCreditCardEnabled.description: Redact credit card numbers from inbound call and chat transcripts and logs. Audio recordings aren't redacted, and outbound interactions aren't included.

isRedactSsnEnabled.title: Redact social security numbers
isRedactSsnEnabled.description: Redact Social Security numbers from inbound call and chat transcripts and logs. Audio recordings aren't redacted, and outbound interactions aren't included.

interdigitTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Interdigit timeout in milliseconds
interdigitTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit applies when your user hasn't met the minimum input length. It applies only to multi-digit DTMF input. The interdigit timeout must be a positive whole number and no special characters or letters can be used. The minimum recommended limit length is 500 ms.

terminationTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Termination timeout in milliseconds
terminationTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit applies when the user has met the maximum input length. It applies only to multi-digit DTMF input. After the limit times out, the bot will accept the input as complete and won't wait for more input. If the termination timeout is turned off, input will immediately be considered complete after it matches the maximum length specification. The termination timeout must be a positive whole number and no special characters or letters can be used.

isDtmfSettingsEnabled.title: Enable DTMF settings
isDtmfSettingsEnabled.description: Enable DTMF settings for voice agent.

silenceDetectionTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Silence detection timeout in milliseconds
silenceDetectionTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: The timeout limit applies when the bot doesn't detect any user input. If no user input is detected within the time limit, the bot can re-engage with the user. Silence detection for telephony begins timing after the IVR finishes speaking.

utteranceEndTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Utterance end timeout in milliseconds
utteranceEndTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit applies when the user pauses during or after speech. If the pause is longer than the timeout limit, the bot presumes the user has finished speaking. The default value for the utterance end timeout is 1500 milliseconds.

speechRecognitionTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Speech recognition timeout in milliseconds
speechRecognitionTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit determines how much time the bot allows for the user's input once they begin speaking. The default value for the speech recognition timeout is 12000 milliseconds.

latencyMessage.title: Message
latencyMessage.description: The activity to send to the user

latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.title: Delay
latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.description: This setting determines how long the bot will wait before delivering the latency message after a background operation request has started. Timing is set in milliseconds.

minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.title: Minimum playback time
minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.description: The latency message will play for this amount of time, at least, even if the background operation completes while the message is playing. Timing is set in milliseconds.

isDomainLanguageModelEnabled.title: Enable Domain Language Model
isDomainLanguageModelEnabled.description: When enabled, a domain-specific language model will be trained on trigger phrases and entity samples in the bot when it is published.

domainLanguageModelWeightValue.title: DomainLanguageModelWeightValue
domainLanguageModelWeightValue.description: The weight of the domain-specific language model compared to the base, value between 0 and 1.

wordsetsWeightValue.title: Wordsets weight
wordsetsWeightValue.description: The weight of the wordsets, value between 0.0 and 1.0.

speechRecognitionSensitivity.title: Speech recognition sensitivity
speechRecognitionSensitivity.description: Controls the level of sensitivity to speech, value between 0.0 and 1.0.

speechRecognitionSpeedVsAccuracy.title: Speech recognition speed vs accuracy
speechRecognitionSpeedVsAccuracy.description: Specifies the desired balance between speed and accuracy.

autoAddLanguageTagInSSML.title: Automatic language tagging
autoAddLanguageTagInSSML.description: When enabled, automatically add language tag around the voice prompt message. This allows for precise language control and improves accuracy when handling multilingual content.

prefixPaddingInMilliseconds.title: Prefix padding
prefixPaddingInMilliseconds.description: The amount of audio the agent processes before the user begins speaking.

audioThreshold.title: Audio Threshold
audioThreshold.description: Controls the level of audio threshold value between 0.0 and 1.0.

speechEndTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Silence duration
speechEndTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: The amount of time the agent waits before it decides the user has finished speaking.

defaultSchemaName.title: DefaultSchemaName
defaultSchemaName.description: Schema name of the GPT to use as default

isFileAnalysisEnabled.title: File Analysis Input
isFileAnalysisEnabled.description: Apply file analysis capability when files are uploaded to a chat

isSemanticSearchEnabled.title: Semantic Search
isSemanticSearchEnabled.description: Allows semantic search with Sharepoint and Graph connectors

historyType.title: History to include
historyType.description: Conversation history type to include when preprocessing the text.

connection.title: Connection
connection.description: An optional connection to use for this model

includeNodeLevelDetailsInTranscript.title: IncludeNodeLevelDetailsInTranscript
includeNodeLevelDetailsInTranscript.description: Include node level details in the transcript

roiCalculation.title: RoiCalculation
roiCalculation.description: Return on investment calculation settings for analytics

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: List of tool configurations for ROI

schemaName.title: SchemaName
schemaName.description: The schema name of the tool

savedCost.title: SavedCost
savedCost.description: The cost value it will save

savedTimeInSeconds.title: SavedTimeInSeconds
savedTimeInSeconds.description: The time in seconds it will save

savedCost.title: SavedCost
savedCost.description: The cost value it will save

savedTimeInSeconds.title: SavedTimeInSeconds
savedTimeInSeconds.description: The time in seconds it will save

sqlServerName.title: SqlServerName
sqlServerName.description: SQL Server Name for SQL Knowledge Source Configuration.

sqlDbName.title: SqlDbName
sqlDbName.description: Database Name for SQL Knowledge source configurations.

datasetName.title: DatasetName
datasetName.description: Dataset Name for structured knowledge sources.

AdaptiveDialog.title: Topic
AdaptiveDialog.description: A topic has trigger phrases and conversation nodes. Trigger phrases are phrases, keywords, and questions that a user is likely to type that are related to a specific issue. Conversation nodes define how a bot should respond to a trigger phrase and what it should do.

modelDisplayName.title: Model Display Name
modelDisplayName.description: Overrides the display name of this component when used by AI models.

modelDescription.title: Model Description
modelDescription.description: Overrides the description of this component when used by AI models.

recognizer.title: Recognizer
recognizer.description: The recognizer used to process input. By default, the Power Virtual Agents recognizer is used.

triggers.title: Triggers
triggers.description: A list of triggers that are evaluated when this topic is active or on the stack.

endAutomatically.title: End automatically
endAutomatically.description: Defines whether the topic should automatically exit when the end of the dialog is reached. This is enabled by default and should only be disabled when additonal triggers have been defined on this topic.

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

RegexRecognizer.title: RegexRecognizer
RegexRecognizer.description: Recognizer using regular expressions to identify intents.

RegexIntentPattern.title: RegexIntentPattern
RegexIntentPattern.description: A single regular expression pattern matching with an intent name.

intent.title: Intent
intent.description: Reference to the trigger that fires when the pattern is matched.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Regular expression pattern for this intent

VirtualAgents.Recognizer.title: VirtualAgents.Recognizer
VirtualAgents.Recognizer.description: Default recognizer implementation which uses Power Virtual Agents recognition.

allowLatencyMessage.title: Send a message
allowLatencyMessage.description: If true, action will be allowed to send a latency message to the user.

latencyMessage.title: Message
latencyMessage.description: The activity to send to the user

latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.title: Delay
latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.description: This setting determines how long the bot will wait before delivering the latency message after a background operation request has started. Timing is set in milliseconds.

minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.title: Minimum playback time
minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.description: The latency message will play for this amount of time, at least, even if the background operation completes while the message is playing. Timing is set in milliseconds.

InvokeFlowAction.title: Action
InvokeFlowAction.description: Invokes a Power Automate flow, possibly with inputs and outputs.

flowId.title: Flow Id
flowId.description: The unique identifier of the Cloud Flow.

errorResponseBody.title: Error response body
errorResponseBody.description: Variable of the error response body

WaitForConnectorTrigger.title: Wait for connector trigger
WaitForConnectorTrigger.description: wait for a connector's trigger to fire, possibly with inputs and outputs.

InvokeConnectorAction.title: Connector action
InvokeConnectorAction.description: Invokes a connector's operation, possibly with inputs and outputs.

InvokeSkillAction.title: Action
InvokeSkillAction.description: Invokes a Skill action, possibly with inputs and outputs.

skillId.title: Skill Id
skillId.description: The unique name (schemaname) of the skill component for which the action is referenced.

actionId.title: Skill action Id
actionId.description: The id of the action within the skill to invoke.

HttpRequestAction.title: HTTP Request
HttpRequestAction.description: Choose a REST API to invoke/sends an HTTP request to an external endpoint.

body.title: Body
body.description: Decide what to send or send nothing

errorHandling.title: Error handling
errorHandling.description: Determine what happens when an error occurs.

response.title: Save response as
response.description: The variable to store the result in.

responseSchema.title: Response data type
responseSchema.description: The schema of the HTTP response object.

responseHeaders.title: Response headers
responseHeaders.description: Variable to store response headers in

content.title: Content
content.description: The raw content to be added into the HTTP request

SearchAndSummarizeContent.title: Create generative answers
SearchAndSummarizeContent.description: Search for content or provide your own context, use OpenAI to create a summarized response using the provided data.

webBrowsing.title: Web browsing
webBrowsing.description: Uses web browsing as a data source

searchEmails.title: Search emails
searchEmails.description: Uses emails as a data source

fileSearchDataSource.title: Search uploaded files
fileSearchDataSource.description: Get search results from uploaded files. Upload files to expand the search.

knowledgeSources.title: Search knowledge sources
knowledgeSources.description: Get search results from the knowledge sources using selected mode.

customDataSource.title: Manually provide data
customDataSource.description: Directly provide content to be summarized in the format of search output

publicDataSource.title: Search public data
publicDataSource.description: Get search results from public websites.

sharePointSearchDataSource.title: Search SharePoint sites
sharePointSearchDataSource.description: Get search results using SharePoint. Provide a list of specific domains to constrain the search.

azureOpenAIOnYourDataSource.title: Azure OpenAI Services on your data
azureOpenAIOnYourDataSource.description: Add a connection from Azure OpenAI as a data source.

applyModelKnowledgeSetting.title: Apply LLM configuration from Settings (preview)
applyModelKnowledgeSetting.description: Applies usage of model knowledge from AI settings

responseCaptureType.title: Save LLM response
responseCaptureType.description: Choose the complete response to save the answer, the citations, and the source metadata. Choose text only to save only the answer and citation.

modality.title: Modality
modality.description: Generate text or speech optimized response based on modality preference.

market.title: Market
market.description: The market where the results come from. e.g. en-US

FileSearchDataSource.title: Search uploaded files
FileSearchDataSource.description: Get search results from uploaded files. Upload files to expand the search.

searchFilesMode.title: Search files
searchFilesMode.description: Get search results from the selected files using selected mode.

SearchAllFiles.title: Search all upload files
SearchAllFiles.description: Get search results using all of the uploaded files.

files.title: Search specific files
files.description: Get search results from the files with schema names that equal one of the schema names in this list.

SearchAllKnowledgeSources.title: Search all knowledge sources
SearchAllKnowledgeSources.description: Get search results using all of the knowledge sources.

searchResults.title: Custom data
searchResults.description: Array of search results provided manually to the system.

CustomSearchInputContent.title: Custom search input content
CustomSearchInputContent.description: A single search result provided manually to the system.

content.title: Content
content.description: Search result content to be used by the model for summarization.

PublicSiteSearchDataSource.title: Search public websites
PublicSiteSearchDataSource.description: Get search results from public websites. Provide a list of specific public domains to constrain the search.

BingCustomSearchDataSource.title: Search with Bing Custom Search
BingCustomSearchDataSource.description: Get search results using Bing Custom Search using a Custom Configuration ID.

customConfigurationId.description: You can easily add or block multiple websites using Bing Custom Search.

SharePointSearchDataSource.title: Search SharePoint sites
SharePointSearchDataSource.description: Get search results using SharePoint. Provide a list of specific domains to constrain the search.

sites.title: SharePoint
sites.description: List of SharePoint sites to constrain the search to.

indexBehavior.title: Index behavior
indexBehavior.description: Determine whether to use advanced indexing when searching for SharePoint content and what happens if a user does not have access to that index.

additionalSearchTerms.title: Additional SearchTerms
additionalSearchTerms.description: Specify a graphQL string which will be added to the graph search

AzureOpenAIOnYourDataSource.title: Azure OpenAI on your data
AzureOpenAIOnYourDataSource.description: Connect an AI model from Azure OpenAI as a data source.

apiVersion.title: Api version
apiVersion.description: The API version to use for this operation. This follows the YYYY-MM-DD format.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: Deployments provide endpoints to the Azure OpenAI base models, or your fine-tuned models, configured with settings to meet your needs, including the content moderation model, version handling, and deployment size.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness. Lowering the temperature means that the model will produce more repetitive and deterministic responses. Increasing the temperature will result in more unexpected or creative responses. Try adjusting temperature or Top P but not both.

topP.title: Top P
topP.description: Similar to temperature, this controls randomness but uses a different method. Lowering Top P will narrow the model's token selection to likelier tokens. Increasing Top P will let the model choose from tokens with both high and low likelihood. Try adjusting temperature or Top P but not both.

stopSequence.title: Stop sequence
stopSequence.description: Make the model end its response at a desired point. The model response will end before the specified sequence, so it won't contain the stop sequence text. For ChatGPT, using |im_end| ensures that the model response doesn't generate a follow-up user query. You can include as many as four stop sequences.

maxTokens.title: Maximum tokens in response
maxTokens.description: Set a limit on the number of tokens per model response. The total length of input tokens and generated tokens is limited by the model's context length. One token is roughly 4 characters for typical English text. If left empty, the model will use its max context length.

AzureCognitiveSearchInternalDataSource.title: AzureCognitiveSearchInternalDataSource
AzureCognitiveSearchInternalDataSource.description: The 'Azure Cognitive Search' data source configured inside Azure OpenAI Studio

titleField.title: Title
titleField.description: Specify the column in your index that contains the original title of each document.

urlField.title: URL
urlField.description: Specify the column in your index that contains the original URL of each document.

filePathField.title: File name
filePathField.description: Specify the column in your index that contains the original file name of each document.

contentFields.title: Content data
contentFields.description: Columns in your index that contain the main text content of each document.

vectorFields.title: Vector data
vectorFields.description: Columns in your index that contain vector data.

embeddingDeploymentName.title: Embedding deployment name
embeddingDeploymentName.description: Specifies the name of the model deployment to use for vectorization. This model deployment must be in the same Azure OpenAI resource specified in the connection, but On Your Data will use this model deployment via an internal call rather than a public one, which enables vector search even in private networks.

semanticConfiguration.title: Semantic search configuration
semanticConfiguration.description: Select a semantic search configuration to use with your search index.

limitResponsesToDataContent.title: Limit responses to your data content

strictness.title: Strictness
strictness.description: The strictness of the search relevance filtering (range: 1 to 5). Higher strictness results in higher precision but lower recall of the answer.

topNDocuments.title: Top N documents
topNDocuments.description: The number of top documents to feature for a query.

AnswerQuestionWithAI.title: Answer question with AI
AnswerQuestionWithAI.description: Uses AI to continue a conversation. Includes recent interactions between the user and the bot.

SearchKnowledgeSources.title: Custom search
SearchKnowledgeSources.description: Creates search queries based on the knowledge sources selected below. This action doesn't summarize information

webBrowsing.title: Web browsing
webBrowsing.description: Uses web browsing as a data source

searchEmails.title: Search emails
searchEmails.description: Uses emails as a data source

fileSearchDataSource.title: Search uploaded files
fileSearchDataSource.description: Get search results from uploaded files. Upload files to expand the search.

knowledgeSources.title: Search knowledge sources
knowledgeSources.description: Get search results from the knowledge sources using selected mode.

historyType.title: History to include
historyType.description: Conversation history type to include when preprocessing the text.

result.title: Output
result.description: The search results will be stored in this output variable.

moderationLevel.title: Content moderation level
moderationLevel.description: Lower levels mean that your agent will generate more answers, but they may not be as relevant. Higher levels favor relevancy over the number of answers.

AdaptiveCardPrompt.title: Adaptive Card
AdaptiveCardPrompt.description: Send an adaptive card to the user and save the response in a variable. You can also use this node to validate user input and reprompt if the input doesn't meet certain criteria.

card.title: Card
card.description: The adaptive card to send to the user

output.title: Output
output.description: Maps outputs of this card to variables.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Ask a question and save the response in a variable. You can also use this node to validate user input and reprompt if the input doesn't meet certain criteria.

alwaysPrompt.title: Skip question
alwaysPrompt.description: If true, the question will be skipped if the variable already has a value.

skipQuestionMode.title: Skip question
skipQuestionMode.description: Controls when to ask the question if the variable already has a value.

variable.title: Variable
variable.description: The variable into which the response will be saved

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The activity to send to the user

invalidPrompt.title: Condition not met prompt
invalidPrompt.description: The prompt to send when the identified entity doesn't pass the validation rules.

defaultValueResponse.title: No entity found message
defaultValueResponse.description: The message to send when the maximum retry count has been reached and the default entity is used.

validation.title: Condition
validation.description: Additional criteria the entity must meet to be considered valid. Must be a formula that evaluates as true or false (e.g. 'Topic.Var1 < 10').

defaultValue.title: Action if no entity found
defaultValue.description: The value to assign the result variable when the maximum retry count has been reached and no entity has been identified.

holdSettings.title: Hold conversations
holdSettings.description: When you turn this on, the agent will pause and wait for a resume word to restart the conversation

wordsetsWeightValue.title: Wordsets weight
wordsetsWeightValue.description: The weight of the wordsets, value between 0.0 and 1.0.

speechRecognitionSensitivity.title: Speech recognition sensitivity
speechRecognitionSensitivity.description: Controls the level of sensitivity to speech, value between 0.0 and 1.0.

speechRecognitionSpeedVsAccuracy.title: Speech recognition speed vs accuracy
speechRecognitionSpeedVsAccuracy.description: Specifies the desired balance between speed and accuracy.

silenceDetectionTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Silence detection timeout
silenceDetectionTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: The timeout limit applies when the agent doesn't detect any user input. If no user input is detected within the time limit, the agent can re-engage with the user. Silence detection for voice speech begins timing after the user finishes speaking.

repeatCountOnSilence.title: How many reprompts on silence
repeatCountOnSilence.description: If the bot continues detects silence, it can ask the question again or send a new message.

inputTimeoutResponse.title: Reprompt message
inputTimeoutResponse.description: Send this message again when a silence detection no input event is recevied.

defaultValueMissingAction.title: Fallback action
defaultValueMissingAction.description: Action to do when exceeding re-prompt attempt or no re-prompt is configured.

utteranceEndTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Utterance end timeout
utteranceEndTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit applies when the user pauses during or after speech. If the pause is longer than the timeout limit, the bot presumes the user has finished speaking. The default value for the utterance end timeout is 1500 milliseconds.

speechRecognitionTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Speech recognition timeout
speechRecognitionTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: This timeout limit determines how much time the bot allows for the user's input once they begin speaking. The default value for the speech recognition timeout is 12000 milliseconds.

resumeWords.title: Resume conversation words
resumeWords.description: A list of common words a user can say to resume a conversation.

holdMusic.title: Hold music or promo URL
holdMusic.description: Enter a URL to a .wav audio file that plays when the converstaion is on hold.

holdTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Prompt again in (milliseconds)
holdTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: Decide how long the agent should wait before prompting the user to resume the conversation.

holdRepeatCount.title: Number of prompts
holdRepeatCount.description: Decide how many times the agent will prompt the user to resume the conversation.

holdTimeoutMessage.title: Prompt message
holdTimeoutMessage.description: The message the agents sends when prompting the user to resume the conversation. It includes an example of the resume words you chose.

resumeResponse.title: Resume message
resumeResponse.description: The message the agent sends when it hears a resume word.

holdWords.title: Hold words
holdWords.description: A list of common words a user can say to hold a conversation.

holdMessage.title: Hold message
holdMessage.description: Send this message when triggering hold state.

resumeWords.title: Resume conversation words
resumeWords.description: A list of common words a user can say to resume a conversation.

holdMusic.title: Hold music or promo URL
holdMusic.description: Enter a URL to a .wav audio file that plays when the converstaion is on hold.

holdTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Prompt again in (milliseconds)
holdTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: Decide how long the agent should wait before prompting the user to resume the conversation.

holdRepeatCount.title: Number of prompts
holdRepeatCount.description: Decide how many times the agent will prompt the user to resume the conversation.

holdTimeoutMessage.title: Prompt message
holdTimeoutMessage.description: The message the agents sends when prompting the user to resume the conversation. It includes an example of the resume words you chose.

resumeResponse.title: Resume message
resumeResponse.description: The message the agent sends when it hears a resume word.

CSATQuestion.title: CSAT Question
CSATQuestion.description: Asks the user for a rating between 1 and 5. CSAT stands for customer satisfaction score

variable.title: Save response as
variable.description: Store the response rating (1-5) in this variable.

OAuthInput.title: Authenticate
OAuthInput.description: Prompts the user to sign in.

title.title: Login text
title.description: The title of the sign-in card

text.title: Description
text.description: Any additional text to include in the sign-in card

resource.title: Resource
resource.description: Optional target to direct what resource to authenticate to

ActionScope.title: A sequence of actions to execute. Action scopes should not be added to a topic explicitly, it is used as part of conditions and loops.

Foreach.title: Loop through a list
Foreach.description: Executes a set of actions for each item in the provided list.

value.title: Loop value variable
value.description: The variable to store the item of the loop in.

index.title: Loop index variable
index.description: The optional variable to store the zero-based index of the items in.

ActivateExternalTrigger.title: ActivateExternalTrigger
ActivateExternalTrigger.description: Enable an external trigger for the user. Will do not do anything if the trigger is already enabled.

externalTriggerId.title: Save new external trigger identifier as
externalTriggerId.description: The variable in which to store the new external trigger identifier.

DisableTrigger.title: DisableTrigger
DisableTrigger.description: Action which un-registers an external trigger based topic

BreakLoop.title: End loop
BreakLoop.description: Used inside loops, such as for each item, to immediately exit the loop.

ContinueLoop.title: Skip to next item
ContinueLoop.description: Used inside loops, such as for each item, to skip to the next item.

EditTableV2.title: Modify items in a list
EditTableV2.description: Add, remove or take items from a list variable. Depending on the change type, this action can add an item to the end of the list, take an item from the beginning or the end of the list, remove an item from anywhere in the list, or clear all items from the list.

AddItemOperation.title: Add item
AddItemOperation.description: Add an item to the list

RemoveItemOperation.title: Remove item
RemoveItemOperation.description: Remove an item from the list

TakeFirstItemOperation.title: Take first item
TakeFirstItemOperation.description: Take the last item from the beginning of the list

TakeLastItemOperation.title: Take last item
TakeLastItemOperation.description: Take the last item in the list

ClearItemsOperation.title: Clear all items
ClearItemsOperation.description: Remove all items from the list

EndDialog.title: End current topic
EndDialog.description: Ends the current dialog topic and returns control to the caller.

clearTopicQueue.title: Clear topic queue
clearTopicQueue.description: Clears upcoming topics that were queued for the current activity.

EndConversation.title: End conversation
EndConversation.description: End the conversation when the user is done interacting with the bot or when the bot can't help the user any further. Channel-specific behavior applies when conversations end. For telephony, the call will hang up.

RecognizeIntent.title: Recognize intent
RecognizeIntent.description: Identifies the intent of the provided input and starts a new conversational flow

value.title: Value
value.description: Values to be included when sending the handoff activity

TransferConversationV2.title: Transfer conversation
TransferConversationV2.description: Transfers the conversation to an external system.

conversationOutcome.title: Conversation outcome for analytics
conversationOutcome.description: Sets the outcome of the current session for the purpose of analytics. The outcome is set before the action's execution.

messageToAgent.title: Message to agent
messageToAgent.description: Contents of the message to send to the agent as part of the transfer.

context.title: Context
context.description: Specify context data to include in the transfer.

sipUuiHeader.title: SIP UUI header
sipUuiHeader.description: The Session Initiation Protocol (SIP) header carries user-to-user call control information between systems. In IVR, the SIP UUI header can be used to pass contextual information like a customer ID or an account number to an external system. If the header exceeds 128 characters, it will be truncated for your agent. Use the test chat to confirm your SIP UUI header will appear appropriately.

sipxHeaders.title: SIP X-Headers
sipxHeaders.description: SIP X-headers to send with this transfer

dtmfSequence.title: DTMF Sequence
dtmfSequence.description: DTMF sequence to send during the External Phone Transfer

SetVariable.title: Set variable value
SetVariable.description: Sets a variable to a provided value

SetTextVariable.title: Set text variable
SetTextVariable.description: Sets a variable to a value that is translated when the bot's message content is translated.

value.title: Value
value.description: The text value to set the variable to.

ParseValue.title: Parse value
ParseValue.description: Parses a string or untyped value to the provided data type. When the input is a string, it will be treated as JSON.

errorPolicy.title: Error policy
errorPolicy.description: Policy for handling properties in the data at execution time which were not defined in the original structure.

SignOutUser.title: Sign out user
SignOutUser.description: Signs out the currently signed in user

CreateSearchQuery.title: Create search query
CreateSearchQuery.description: Produces a search query using the conversation history and the user input.

userInput.title: User input
userInput.description: Input string from the user, defaulting to the last message the user sent to the agent.

moderationLevel.title: Content moderation level
moderationLevel.description: Lower levels mean that your agent will generate more answers, but they may not be as relevant. Higher levels favor relevancy over the number of answers.

historyType.title: History to include
historyType.description: Conversation history type to include when preprocessing the text.

result.title: Save response as
result.description: Store the produced output in this variable

historyType.title: History to include
historyType.description: Conversation history type to include when preprocessing the text.

instructions.title: Custom instructions
instructions.description: Explain how you want the orchestrator to fulfill a user's query using a set of tools

responseInstructions.title: Response instructions
responseInstructions.description: Explain how you want the agent to respond or what you want it to do when responding. For example, you can say "talk in a professional manner."

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Tools available to the agent for extended functionality.

knowledgeSources.title: Search knowledge sources
knowledgeSources.description: Get search results from the knowledge sources using selected mode.

fileSearchDataSource.title: Search uploaded files
fileSearchDataSource.description: Get search results from uploaded files. Upload files to expand the search.

conversationStarters.title: Conversation starters
conversationStarters.description: A list of prompts that can be used as conversation starters.

webBrowsing.title: Web browsing
webBrowsing.description: Uses web browsing as a data source

codeInterpreter.title: Code interpreter
codeInterpreter.description: When enabled, allows users to perform complex analysis and visualizations over their data.

fineTunedModels.title: FineTuned Models
fineTunedModels.description: When enabled, can use fine tuned modesl

searchTeams.title: Search Teams
searchTeams.description: When enabled, can search all Teams sources.

searchOneDriveAndSharePoint.title: Search OneDrive and SharePoint
searchOneDriveAndSharePoint.description: When enabled, can search all OneDrive and SharePoint sources.

searchEmails.title: Search Emails
searchEmails.description: Uses emails as a data source.

searchMeetings.title: Search Meetings
searchMeetings.description: When enabled, can search all Teams meeting transcripts as sources.

searchPeople.title: Search People
searchPeople.description: When enabled, can add people in the user's organization as knowledge sources.

tenantFineTunedModelDetails.title: Tenant Fine Tuned Model Details
tenantFineTunedModelDetails.description: The details of the fine tuned model.

TenantFineTunedModelDetails.title: Tenant Fine Tuned Model Details
TenantFineTunedModelDetails.description: The details of the fine tuned model.

modelId.title: Model Id
modelId.description: The guid referencing the fine tuned model.

scenarioName.title: Scenario Name
scenarioName.description: The name of the scenario the model was trained for.

text.title: Text
text.description: Text that will be sent when the conversation starter is selected

RecurrenceTrigger.title: Creates Recurrence Trigger
RecurrenceTrigger.description: A trigger that gets invoked based on a recurrence

CreateConversationConnectorTrigger.title: Create Conversation Connector Trigger
CreateConversationConnectorTrigger.description: A trigger that gets invoked based on an external signal and creates a new conversation.

ContinueConversationConnectorTrigger.title: Continue Conversation Connector trigger
ContinueConversationConnectorTrigger.description: A trigger that gets invoked based on an external signal.

OnRedirect.title: On Redirect
OnRedirect.description: Activates only when redirected to, this topic is not triggered automatically.

OnPlanComplete.title: On Plan Completed
OnPlanComplete.description: Activates when a Plan finishes executing

OnKnowledgeRequested.title: On Knowledge Requested
OnKnowledgeRequested.description: Turns the topic into a knowledge source, activates when the knowledge source is requested.

OnGeneratedResponse.title: On Generated Response
OnGeneratedResponse.description: Triggered when a response is generated by the agent, after all topics, actions and knowledge have been called, prior to it being sent to the conversation.

OnOutgoingMessage.title: On Outgoing Message
OnOutgoingMessage.description: Triggered when a message is about to be sent by the agent to the conversation.

OnCopilotRedirect.title: Microsoft Copilot (preview)
OnCopilotRedirect.description: Activates when a Microsoft Copilot triggers this.

askForConfirmation.title: Ask for confirmation
askForConfirmation.description: Microsoft Copilot will ask for confirmation before executing this plugin.

conversationStarters.title: Conversation starters
conversationStarters.description: Sample queries that will be used to start this plugin.

OnActivity.title: On Activity
OnActivity.description: Triggered when an activity is received. Optionally filtered to a specific activity type.

type.title: Activity type
type.description: Optional filter for a specific activity type.

OnEventActivity.title: On Event Activity
OnEventActivity.description: Triggered when an activity of type Event is received. Optionally filtered to a specific event name.

eventName.title: Event name
eventName.description: Optional filter for a specific event name.

OnDtmfKeyPress.title: DTMF received
OnDtmfKeyPress.description: Triggered when a DTMF key tone is received. Node-level DTMF configurations overrule bot-level DTMF configurations or triggers.

description.title: Description
description.description: In a few words, say what it is and when it should be used, so your agent can use it effectively.

triggerQueries.title: Add phrases
triggerQueries.description: Phrases teach the agent different ways someone might ask about this topic. Natural language understanding helps identify a topic based on meaning and not exact words.

OnRecognizedIntent.title: On Recognized Intent
OnRecognizedIntent.description: Triggered when an intent is recognized.

OnInactivity.title: Inactivity
OnInactivity.description: Triggered when no user input has been received for a specified amount of time

durationInSeconds.title: Inactivity duration
durationInSeconds.description: Choose how long a chat session must be inactive before this topic triggers.

OnAnsweringMachineDetected.title: Answering Machine Detected
OnAnsweringMachineDetected.description: This will be triggered when agent detects that it is interacting with an Answering Machine

OnSelectIntent.title: On Select Intent
OnSelectIntent.description: Triggered when the recognizer recognizes more than 1 similar intent

triggerBehavior.title: On Select Intent Trigger Behavior
triggerBehavior.description: Control when this trigger will execute

OnError.title: On Error
OnError.description: Triggered when an error occurs. The ErrorCode and ErrorMessage variables are available to get more details about the error.

OnUnrecognizedSpeech.title: Unrecognized Speech
OnUnrecognizedSpeech.description: Triggered when the user responds to the bot and the speech recognition engine can't determine what the user said.

OnAnalyzeText.title: On Analyze Text
OnAnalyzeText.description: Triggered when the bot needs to recognize intents and/or entities.

OnSignIn.title: On Sign In
OnSignIn.description: Triggered when sign in is required.

OnUnknownIntent.title: On Unknown Intent
OnUnknownIntent.description: Triggered when a user's message matches no intents.

OnUnknownDtmfKey.title: On Unknown DTMF Key
OnUnknownDtmfKey.description: Triggered when the user provided unrecognizable DTMF key, i.e. it doesn't match to any option.

OnSilence.title: Silence detected
OnSilence.description: Triggered when a duration has passed without the user providing any speech or DTMF input. Silence detection must be turned on in bot settings.

silenceDetectionTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Silence detection timeout
silenceDetectionTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: Time, in ms, to wait for speech once a prompt has finished playing before throwing a NO_INPUT event.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: The settings for controlling the behavior of this topic.

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

SkillDefinition.title: SkillDefinition
SkillDefinition.description: Contains metadata for a skill integrated into Power Virtual Agents including the actions the skill supports, endpoint, and access information.

appId.title: AppId
appId.description: The environment variable containing the skill's client id of the Azure AD application or user-assigned managed identity.

appEndpoint.title: AppEndpoint
appEndpoint.description: The environment variable containing skill's HTTP endpoint address.

SkillActionDefinition.title: Skill action definition.
SkillActionDefinition.description: Represents a single callable skill action.

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

triggerCondition.title: Condition
triggerCondition.description: Decides whether the file attachment as a knowledge source should be used by the AI planner. Ignored when used explicitly from a topic.

PublicSiteSearchSource.title: Search public websites
PublicSiteSearchSource.description: Get search results from specified public site.

site.title: Public website
site.description: The path may be up to two levels of depth.

BingCustomSearchSource.title: Search with Bing Custom Search
BingCustomSearchSource.description: Get search results using Bing Custom Search using a Custom Configuration ID.

customConfigurationId.title: Bing Custom Search
customConfigurationId.description: You can easily add or block multiple websites using Bing Custom Search.

CustomKnowledgeSource.title: Manually provide data
CustomKnowledgeSource.description: Directly provide content to be summarized in the format of search output

searchResults.title: Custom data
searchResults.description: Array of search results provided manually to the system.

AzureOpenAIOnYourDataKnowledgeSource.title: Azure OpenAI on your data
AzureOpenAIOnYourDataKnowledgeSource.description: Connect an AI model from Azure OpenAI as a knowledge source.

apiVersion.title: Api version
apiVersion.description: The API version to use for this operation. This follows the YYYY-MM-DD format.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: Deployments provide endpoints to the Azure OpenAI base models, or your fine-tuned models, configured with settings to meet your needs, including the content moderation model, version handling, and deployment size.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness. Lowering the temperature means that the model will produce more repetitive and deterministic responses. Increasing the temperature will result in more unexpected or creative responses. Try adjusting temperature or Top P but not both.

topP.title: Top P
topP.description: Similar to temperature, this controls randomness but uses a different method. Lowering Top P will narrow the model's token selection to likelier tokens. Increasing Top P will let the model choose from tokens with both high and low likelihood. Try adjusting temperature or Top P but not both.

stopSequence.title: Stop sequence
stopSequence.description: Make the model end its response at a desired point. The model response will end before the specified sequence, so it won't contain the stop sequence text. For ChatGPT, using |im_end| ensures that the model response doesn't generate a follow-up user query. You can include as many as four stop sequences.

maxTokens.title: Maximum tokens in response
maxTokens.description: Set a limit on the number of tokens per model response. The total length of input tokens and generated tokens is limited by the model's context length. One token is roughly 4 characters for typical English text. If left empty, the model will use its max context length.

AzureAISearchSource.title: Search external items configured with Azure AI Search connector.
AzureAISearchSource.description: Get search results from specified AI Search connector.

indexName.title: IndexName
indexName.description: Display name of the Azure AI Search Index Name.

nearestNeighbors.title: NearestNeighbors
nearestNeighbors.description: Display name of the Number of nearest neighbors to return as top hits.

selectFields.title: Select fields
selectFields.description: Display name of the select fields for query using Azure AI Search index.

searchFields.title: Search fields
searchFields.description: Display name of the search fields for query to search on using Azure AI Search index.

semanticConfigurationName.title: Semantic configuration name
semanticConfigurationName.description: The name of the semantic configuration to use when searching.

GraphConnectorSearchSource.title: Search substrate external items configured with graph connector.

connectionId.title: Graph Connection
connectionId.description: Environment Variable that contains the unique id for the graph connection.

connectionName.title: Graph Connection
connectionName.description: Display name of the graph connection.

contentSourceDisplayName.title: Content Source Display Name
contentSourceDisplayName.description: Display name shown for result content source of the graph connection.

contentSourceIcon.title: Content Source Icon
contentSourceIcon.description: Icon of the result content source associated with this graph connection.

publisherName.title: Publisher Name
publisherName.description: Publisher of the connector. Example - Microsoft

additionalSearchTerms.title: Additional SearchTerms
additionalSearchTerms.description: Specify a string which will be added to the query API search

itemsByUrl.title: Graph connector items or containers that are searched by url

itemsByExternalId.title: Graph connector items or containers that are searched by external ids

itemsByPath.title: Graph connector items or containers that are searched by paths

GraphConnectorItemByUrl.title: Graph connector items or containers url
GraphConnectorItemByUrl.description: Graph connector items or containers that can be searched by url

url.description: Graph connector items or containers url to constrain the search to.

GraphConnectorItemByExternalId.description: Graph connector items or containers that can be searched on using external id

externalId.title: External Id
externalId.description: Specify a external id of the item to be used for search

FabricAISkillSource.description: Accelerate Data analysis with advanced AI skills from Microsoft Fabric

SharePointSearchSource.title: Search SharePoint sites
SharePointSearchSource.description: Get search results using specified SharePoint site.

cascadeShare.title: Share with users
cascadeShare.description: Shares the file or site with Copilot users when sharing the Copilot.

site.title: SharePoint site
site.description: SharePoint site to constrain the search to.

indexBehavior.description: Determine whether to use advanced indexing when searching for SharePoint content and what happens if a user does not have access to that index.

additionalSearchTerms.title: Additional SearchTerms
additionalSearchTerms.description: Specify a string which will be added to the Graph API search

TeamsMessageSearchSource.title: Search Teams messages

url.description: Meeting transcript url to constrain the search to.

id.title: Meeting Id

isSeries.title: Is the meeting a series

mailbox.title: Email mailbox
mailbox.description: Shared/group mailbox for the email search.

folders.title: Email folders
folders.description: List of folders for the scoped email search.

DataverseStructuredSearchSource.title: Search specified entities
DataverseStructuredSearchSource.description: Get search results from specified entities.

FederatedStructuredSearchSource.title: Search federated sources in 3P
FederatedStructuredSearchSource.description: Get search results from federated sources in 3P.

CopilotConnectorKnowledgeSourceDemo.description: Get search results from specified agent connector(s).

callbackMessage.title: CallbackMessage
callbackMessage.description: Message used to invoke the agent when this trigger fires.
