mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Controls which user authentication type the trigger uses.

callbackMessage.title: CallbackMessage
callbackMessage.description: Message used to invoke the agent when this trigger fires.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Specifies the configuration parameters required for a trigger. E.g., inbox name for an Outlook trigger.

enterpriseKnowledgeConnectionReference.title: Connection
enterpriseKnowledgeConnectionReference.description: Connection used to access enterprise knowledge

moderatedCustomResponse.title: When potential responses get flagged by content moderation, send:

domainLanguageModelWeightValue.title: DomainLanguageModelWeightValue
domainLanguageModelWeightValue.description: The weight of the domain-specific language model compared to the base, value between 0 and 1. This can be set per local.

interruptionEagerness.title: Eagerness
interruptionEagerness.description: This property is a way to control how eager the model is to interrupt the user.

holdWords.title: Hold words
holdWords.description: A list of common words a user can say to hold a conversation.

holdMessage.title: Hold message
holdMessage.description: Send this message when triggering hold state.

resumeWords.title: Resume conversation words
resumeWords.description: A list of common words a user can say to resume a conversation.

holdMusic.title: Hold music or promo URL
holdMusic.description: Enter a URL to a .wav audio file that plays when the converstaion is on hold.

holdTimeoutInMilliseconds.title: Prompt again in (milliseconds)
holdTimeoutInMilliseconds.description: Decide how long the agent should wait before prompting the user to resume the conversation.

holdRepeatCount.title: Number of prompts
holdRepeatCount.description: Decide how many times the agent will prompt the user to resume the conversation.

holdTimeoutMessage.title: Prompt message
holdTimeoutMessage.description: The message the agents sends when prompting the user to resume the conversation. It includes an example of the resume words you chose.

resumeResponse.title: Resume response
resumeResponse.description: The message the agent sends when it hears a resume word.

VoiceMessageLatencySettings.title: Message latency settings
VoiceMessageLatencySettings.description: Settings for playing a message during latency

latencyMessage.title: LatencyMessage
latencyMessage.description: The latency message to play for c2 users

VoiceAudioLatencySettings.title: Audio latency settings
VoiceAudioLatencySettings.description: Settings for playing audio during latency

latencyAudio.title: LatencyAudio
latencyAudio.description: The latency audio to play for c2 users

fallbackLatencyMessage.title: FallbackLatencyMessage
fallbackLatencyMessage.description: The fallback latency message to play for c2 users

voiceName.title: Voice name
voiceName.description: Enable the maker to select the voice type used for speech playback.

speakingSpeed.title: Speaking speed
speakingSpeed.description: Enable a maker to choose the speed at which the model speaks back.  Default this option to 1.0, enable a selection from 0.25 to 1.5.

RealtimeVoiceMessageLatencySettings.title: Message latency settings
RealtimeVoiceMessageLatencySettings.description: Settings for playing a message during latency

latencyMessage.title: LatencyMessage
latencyMessage.description: The latency message to play for c2 users

RealtimeVoiceAudioLatencySettings.title: Audio latency settings
RealtimeVoiceAudioLatencySettings.description: Settings for playing audio during latency

latencyAudio.title: LatencyAudio
latencyAudio.description: The latency audio to play for c2 users

fallbackLatencyMessage.title: FallbackLatencyMessage
fallbackLatencyMessage.description: The fallback latency message to play for c2 users

EvaluationSet.title: Evaluation set
EvaluationSet.description: A set of data for evaluation along with graders that evaluate outputs.

graders.title: Graders
graders.description: The graders that will be used to evaluate the agent and model outputs.

ToolCallGrader.title: ToolCallGrader
ToolCallGrader.description: Validates that specific tools or topics were invoked during execution.

name.title: Name
name.description: The display name for this grader.

code.title: Code
code.description: Python code that evaluates the agent's response. Code must define a grade(conversation, input) function that returns a float score that will be compared against the threshold.

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: The passing score threshold (0.0 to 1.0). Test cases pass when the grade function returns a score larger or equal to this value.

EvaluationData.title: Evaluation data
EvaluationData.description: A set of data for evaluation along with expected responses

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this topic.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this topic.

isAgentConnectable.title: Let other agents connect to and use this one
isAgentConnectable.description: Let agents work together to complete workflows

ReferencesSourceFile.title: ReferencesSourceFile
ReferencesSourceFile.description: Source file representation for Component References

ConnectionReferencesSourceFile.title: ConnectionReferencesSourceFile
ConnectionReferencesSourceFile.description: Source file representation for Connection References used in workspace provisioning

options.title: Options
options.description: The configuration options for the tool.

content.title: Content
content.description: Search result content to be used by the model for summarization.

knowledgeName.title: KnowledgeName
knowledgeName.description: The given name of the knowledge source

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the function to be invoked.

description.title: Description
description.description: A description of what the function does.

clientActionInputSchema.title: ClientActionInputSchema
clientActionInputSchema.description: The inputs sent to the client in an event

clientActionResponseSchema.title: ClientActionResponseSchema
clientActionResponseSchema.description: The outputs returned from the client

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: List of MCP tools that never require approval. If empty, all tools won't require approval.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: List of MCP tools that always require approval. If empty, all tools will require approval.

toolAugmentation.title: Add tool dependencies
toolAugmentation.description: When enabled, tool dependencies will be added to the agent invoking this action.

DisableToolAugmentation.title: Disable tool dependencies
DisableToolAugmentation.description: No tool dependencies will be added to the agent invoking this action.

EnableToolAugmentation.title: Enable tool dependencies
EnableToolAugmentation.description: Tool dependencies will be added to the agent invoking this action.

historyType.title: History to include
historyType.description: Conversation history type to include when invoking the agent.

isElicitationEnabled.title: Enable elicitation
isElicitationEnabled.description: Allows the MCP server to ask questions directly to end users. When disabled, the server will respond based on the provided information.

UseAllTools.title: Use all tools
UseAllTools.description: Use all available tools from the MCP server.

UseSpecificTools.title: Use specific tools
UseSpecificTools.description: Use only specific tools from the MCP server.

tools.title: Specific tools
tools.description: List of specific tools to use from the MCP server.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: A2A protocol extensions including input/output schemas.

A2AExtensions.title: A2AExtensions
A2AExtensions.description: Extensions for the A2A protocol, providing input/output schemas.

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

isElicitationEnabled.title: Enable elicitation
isElicitationEnabled.description: Allows the MCP server to ask questions directly to end users. When disabled, the server will respond based on the provided information.

instructions.title: Custom instructions
instructions.description: Explain how you want the agent to respond or what you want it to do when responding. For example, you can say "talk in a professional manner."

inputType.title: InputType
inputType.description: Expected input type for this agent

model.title: Model
model.description: The preferred model to use if available.

initializeContext.title: InitializeContext
initializeContext.description: Additional context to provide to the computer using agent

credentialIds.title: CredentialIds
credentialIds.description: List of credential identifiers to use for the computer using agent

outputType.title: Output type
outputType.description: Schema for the structured output of the computer using agent. When not set, the output is plain text.

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: List of website domains. Can be used with asterisks/wild cards to indicate all websites and perform pattern matching.

desktopApps.title: Applications
desktopApps.description: List of applications. No wild card is supported and must match exactly one of the three fields: Product Name, File description or process name.

aIModelId.title: AI Model ID
aIModelId.description: The unique identifier of the AI Model

flowId.title: Flow Id
flowId.description: The unique identifier of the Cloud Flow.

skillId.title: Skill Id
skillId.description: The unique name (schemaname) of the skill component for which the action is referenced.

actionId.title: Skill action Id
actionId.description: The id of the action within the skill to invoke.

oneOf.title: Default behavior
oneOf.description: No special action taken when the topic starts.

oneOf.title: Cancel other topics
oneOf.description: Cancel all other topics before starting this topic.

oneOf.title: Use latest published content and cancel other topics.
oneOf.description: Cancel all other topics before starting this topic. Look for the lastest published version, and apply it to this conversation.

oneOf.title: Default
oneOf.description: Does not trigger when a question is interrupted.

oneOf.title: Trigger on topics and questions
oneOf.description: Trigger either when multiple topics are matched, or when multiple potential topics are found when a question is interrupted.

oneOf.title: Resolved (confirmed)
oneOf.description: If the dialog action is reached then the current session is considered resolved for the purpose of analytics. The session ends immediately for the purpose of analytics.

oneOf.title: Resolved (implied)
oneOf.description: If the dialog action is reached and user didn't reply then we consider that the current session is in assumed resolved for the purpose of analytics.

oneOf.title: Escalated
oneOf.description: If the dialog action is reached then the current session is considered escalated for the purpose of analytics.

oneOf.title: Global variables for the current session
Conversation history for the current session
Topic
oneOf.description: Variables from the current topic

oneOf.title: Global
oneOf.description: Global variables

oneOf.title: All
oneOf.description: All variables

oneOf.title: Public Network
oneOf.description: Use public addresses and internet for network communication.

oneOf.title: Virtual Network
oneOf.description: Use virtual network subnet delegated to the Power Platform.

oneOf.title: Provisioning
oneOf.description: The bot is currently provisioning

oneOf.title: Provisioned
oneOf.description: The bot is fully provisioned including BCR resources.

oneOf.title: ProvisionedWithoutRegistration
oneOf.description: The bot is provisioned but it doesn't have app and bot registration in azure.

oneOf.title: ContentReady
oneOf.description: The bot is content is ready for use. The bot is still provisioning.

oneOf.title: ProvisionFailed
oneOf.description: The bot failed to provision

oneOf.title: Lowest
oneOf.description: Lowest moderation, allowing the bot to generate many responses, though they may include inaccuracies

oneOf.title: Low
oneOf.description: Bot generates most responses, but responses can have inaccuracies

oneOf.title: Medium
oneOf.description: Bot generates more responses, but responses may be less relevant

oneOf.title: High
oneOf.description: Bot generates fewer responses, but responses are relevant

oneOf.title: Highest
oneOf.description: Highest moderation, limiting the bot's responses to ensure only the most accurate and relevant content

oneOf.title: Friendly
oneOf.description: Warm, approachable, friendly, and open

oneOf.title: Confident
oneOf.description: Efficient, competent, secure, and reliable

oneOf.title: Empathetic
oneOf.description: Understanding, compassionate, and sensitive

oneOf.title: Conversational
oneOf.description: Clear, casual, easy to understand, and familiar

oneOf.title: Professional
oneOf.description: Respectful, knowledgable, neutral, and formal

oneOf.title: Motivational
oneOf.description: Enthusiastic, cheerful, and positive

oneOf.title: Disabled
oneOf.description: Do not use any advanced indexing for SharePoint queries.

oneOf.title: EnabledWithFallback
oneOf.description: Use advanced indexing for SharePoint queries. If a user does not have access, fallback to a non-indexed query.

oneOf.title: EnabledWithoutFallback
oneOf.description: Use advanced indexing for SharePoint queries. If a user does not have access, return no results.

oneOf.title: All
oneOf.description: All outputs from the action definition will be included

oneOf.title: Specific
oneOf.description: User will specify which outputs should be included

oneOf.title: Based on sound (silence)
oneOf.description: Detect user has stopped speaking based on sound.

oneOf.title: Based on sentence context
oneOf.description: Detect user has stopped speaking based on meaning.

oneOf.title: Prompt for disambiguation
oneOf.description: When the recognized date/time is ambiguous, prompt the user to clarify (default behavior).

oneOf.title: Automatically select next occurrence
oneOf.description: When the recognized date/time is ambiguous, automatically pick the next matching occurrence relative to now.

oneOf.title: Automatically select previous occurrence
oneOf.description: When the recognized date/time is ambiguous, automatically pick the previous matching occurrence relative to now.

oneOf.title: Throw error
oneOf.description: Runtime data that can't be parsed into the appropiate type will raise a Runtime Error

oneOf.title: Default Blank
oneOf.description: Runtime data that can't be parsed into the appropiate type will be ignored and properties without values will be filled with null

oneOf.title: Text only
oneOf.description: Store the textual output in the target variable.

oneOf.title: Complete (recommended)
oneOf.description: Store the text output, the speech output and the citations in the response variable.

is less than or equal to

The variable can be used in AI processing
